'''Galactic Access, Inc.''' was a company that operated [[Estaria Central Starport]]. Galactic Access's business model meant they operated the facilities for profit first, legality second. Because of this, the company drew the attention of [[Division Three]], the anti-contraband department of the [[Imperial Taxation Bureau]].<ref name="HS" />
